title: Saltwater Goodbye
lyricSeed:
You left with the tide this morning
And I'm okay, I'm okay
Salt on my lips, sun on my shoulders
Waving your name away
Golden hour turns me golden
Every ending's a coast
I'll dance in the foam without you
Missing you the most

chunks.text:
You left with the tide this morning
And I'm okay, I'm okay
Salt on my lips, sun on my shoulders
Waving your name away
Golden hour turns me golden
Every ending's a coast
I'll dance in the foam without you
Missing you the most
